sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad, dismiss the popup ad that appears, then read the page content

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Entry Ad Page with Modal
workflow.description: The entry ad page has loaded, and a modal dialog is visible, requiring dismissal.
triggers: If a modal dialog with class 'modal' is visible
If a button with text 'Close' is visible

workflow.name: Ad Dismissed, Content Visible
workflow.description: The modal ad has been dismissed, and the main page content is now visible and ready to be read.
triggers: If a heading with text 'Entry Ad' is visible
If no modal dialog with class 'modal' is visible
actions: Terminate: Ad dismissed and page content is visible.
